   "source": [
    "# 信号抽出: 色付き雑音からの微弱信号回収\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/case_signal_extraction.ipynb)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b7d71eb7",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.002162,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:18.457778+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:18.455616+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "このケーススタディは legacy の weak-signal notebook を公開 gallery 向けに整理したものです。物理的に見たいのは、生波形では見えない狭帯域信号をどうやって回収するかです。\n",
    "\n",
    "ここでは弱い単色線を注入し、ASD で候補周波数を見つけ、band-pass で取り出してから簡単な正弦波モデルを当てます。\n",
    "\n",
    "- **関連 API**: [Time Series API](../../reference/api/timeseries.rst), [Signal API](../../reference/api/signal.rst)\n",
    "- **関連理論**: [検証済みアルゴリズム](../validated_algorithms.md), [数値安定性](../numerical_stability.md)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "6d0fe479",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T10:05:18.479481Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T10:05:18.479193Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.193523Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.183101Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 11.728689,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.197825+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:18.469136+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy import TimeSeries\n",
    "\n",
    "duration = 32\n",
    "sample_rate = 4096\n",
    "signal_freq = 123.4\n",
    "signal_amp = 0.5\n",
    "noise_std = 5.0\n",
    "t = np.linspace(0, duration, int(duration * sample_rate), endpoint=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "# The injected tone is far below the broadband noise floor, which is why it disappears in the raw waveform.\n",
    "noise = np.random.normal(0, noise_std, size=len(t))\n",
    "clean_signal = signal_amp * np.sin(2 * np.pi * signal_freq * t)\n",
    "ts = TimeSeries(noise + clean_signal, t0=0, sample_rate=sample_rate, name=\"Noisy Data\", unit=\"V\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a8a95a13",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.005938,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.216880+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.210942+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. 候補帯域を見つける\n",
    "\n",
    "ASD の平均化は推定分散を減らすので、時間波形では見えない狭帯域線が統計的に見えるようになります。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "28e7649a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.230808Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.230350Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T10:05:43.286056Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T10:05:43.285281Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 13.065135,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:43.287587+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T10:05:30.222452+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },

   "source": [
    "plot = ts.plot()\n",
    "plot.gca().set_xlim(0, 0.1)\n",
    "plot.gca().set_title(\"Raw Time Series (Zoomed)\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "asd = ts.asd(fftlength=4, method=\"welch\")\n",
    "plot = asd.plot()\n",
    "plot.gca().set_xlim(10, 1000)\n",
    "plot.gca().set_yscale(\"log\")\n",
    "plot.gca().set_title(\"ASD\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "76b93ea3",
   "metadata": {

     "duration": 0.01098,

     "status": "completed"

    "tags": [

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. フィルタしてフィットする\n",
    "\n",
    "band-pass は注入線を残しつつ不要な広帯域成分を落とすためのものです。帯域を狭くしすぎると波形を歪め、広くしすぎると雑音を戻してしまいます。\n",
    "\n",
    "- **関連 API**: [Time Series API](../../reference/api/timeseries.rst), [Fitting API](../../reference/api/fitting.rst)\n",
    "- **関連理論**: [検証済みアルゴリズム](../validated_algorithms.md)"
   ]
  },

      "│  freq2 │     3.7e-6    0.07e-3    -0.0005   0.84e-15    0.00126    -0.0085 │\n",
      "│ phase2 │   -25.5e-6   -0.50e-3     0.0034  -5.61e-15    -0.0085     0.0569 │\n",

   "source": [
    "# Keep the band around the detected line so the fit sees the signal-dominated portion of the data.\n",
    "filtered_ts = ts.bandpass(110, 130).crop(1, 1.1)\n",
    "\n",
    "plot = filtered_ts.plot()\n",
    "plot.gca().set_title(\"Band-passed TimeSeries\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "def sine_model(t, amp, freq, phase, amp2, freq2, phase2):\n",
    "    return amp * np.sin(2 * np.pi * freq * t + phase) * (1 + amp2 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * freq2 * t + phase2))\n",
    "\n",
    "p0 = {\"amp\": 0.5, \"freq\": 123, \"phase\": 0, \"amp2\": 0.05, \"freq2\": 10, \"phase2\": 0}\n",
    "limits = {\"freq\": (110, 130), \"amp\": (0.1, 5), \"amp2\": (0, 0.2), \"freq2\": (0, 50)}\n",
    "result = filtered_ts.fit(sine_model, p0=p0, limits=limits, sigma=0.01)\n",
    "print(result)\n",
    "result.plot()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
